_readme: Copy this file to sessions.json and fill in your tokens. Never commit sessions.json (it's in .gitignore).

_how_to_get: OPTION A — Web session JWT (eyJ...) — text chat only, no API key needed:
1. Log into chatgpt.com in Chrome
2. Open DevTools (Cmd+Option+I) → Application → Storage → Cookies → chatgpt.com
3. Find '__Secure-next-auth.session-token' → copy its value
4. OR: DevTools → Console → paste: await fetch('/api/auth/session').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>console.log(d.accessToken))
5. Paste the eyJ... token as access_token below
OPTION B — Real OpenAI API key (sk-...) — text + image generation (DALL-E 3):
1. Go to platform.openai.com/api-keys
2. Create a new key with 'All' permissions
3. Paste the sk-... key as access_token below
OPTION C — Web session + cookies (for DALL-E image generation without API key):
1. Log into chatgpt.com in Chrome
2. DevTools → Network → click any chatgpt.com request → copy 'Cookie' header value
3. Run: python3 aiteam.py login chatgpt  and paste the cookie string when prompted
Note: cf_clearance cookie expires every few hours and is IP-bound
chatgpt.access_token: eyJ... (web session JWT, expires ~10 days) OR sk-... (API key, never expires)
chatgpt.proxy: optional: http://user:pass@host:port or socks5://host:port (leave empty if not needed)

_how_to_get: 1. Go to aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
2. Click 'Create API key'
3. Paste below
OPTION A — Browser cookies (free with Pro subscription):
1. Log into perplexity.ai in Chrome
2. DevTools → Network → click any perplexity.ai request → copy 'Cookie' header value
3. Run: python3 aiteam.py login perplexity  and paste the cookie string when prompted
OPTION B — API key (paid, perplexity.ai/settings/api):
Paste the pplx-... key as api_key below
